phases.name: Write BudgetTracker tests
phases.reasoning: Create src/cmd/autoresearch/budget.rs with all 12+ tests: defaults, pricing math (Claude/GPT/zero), can_afford (within/exceeds/after-spending), record_cost updates, record_cost rejects over-budget, remaining floor, restore_from_experiment_count, JSON roundtrip, save/load, load nonexistent. Include minimal struct definitions and method signatures (returning todo!() or unimplemented!()) so tests compile but fail.

phases.name: Implement BudgetTracker
phases.reasoning: Implement ModelPricing (claude_sonnet, gpt_5_4, estimate_cost), CostRecord, and BudgetTracker (new, can_afford, remaining, record_cost with budget rejection, restore_from_experiment_count, to_json/from_json, save/load). Wire pub mod budget in autoresearch/mod.rs. Run cargo clippy and ensure all 12+ tests pass.
